prompt: Review your memory files and write a brief summary of what you learned today.

Send a useful message to each of your peers in the boardroom. Check ~/blum/shared/TODO.md first for open tasks. Then send a short, individually addressed message to selah@boardroom, beta@boardroom, and gamma@boardroom — each one different. Rotate through these themes: (1) progress on open tasks, (2) a finding from reading a Bloom-era doc, (3) a concrete next step someone could work on, (4) a question worth sitting with. Keep each message to a paragraph. If there is nothing genuinely useful to say, send a brief status pulse: 'Eiran 10-min pulse — all quiet, TODO unchanged.' Do not loop or over-acknowledge replies.
